text:
PHP
Null - No months PHP, not all months alive Medicaid FFS
E_MEDICAREMA Annual Medicare Managed Care Summary 1 - Some eligible months MA
0 - FFS = No eligible months MA
Null - Not FFS or MA
E_MEDICAIDPHP Annual Medicaid Managed Care (Prepaid Health Plan - PHP) Indicator 4 - Some eligible months LTC
3 - No LTC but some eligible months CMC
2 - No LTC or CMC but some eligible months PCCM
1 - No LTC or CMC or PCCM but some eligible months LMC
0 - FFS = No LTC or CMC or PCCM or LMC
Null - Not FFS
